## Summary

## Scope

## Checklist

- [ ] I verified this change belongs in this repository
- [ ] I updated docs/links for current product status
- [ ] I avoided exposing secrets/private data
- [ ] I used Conventional Commit style for commit messages
- [ ] I ran relevant checks/tests
